name: March Madness Analytics
postCreateCommand: cp -r /tmp/claude-host /root/.claude && cp /tmp/claude-host.json /root/.claude.json && find /root/.claude -type f -name '*.json' -exec sed -i "s|$HOST_HOME/.claude|/root/.claude|g; s|$HOST_HOME|/workspace|g" {} + && curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash
